连接服务器后将自动进入全屏控制界面: The remote console opens after the server connects
查看、导入或撤销证书信任: Review, import, or revoke certificate trust
本次会话信任自签名证书: Inspect and trust a self-signed certificate
连接前显示服务器证书 SHA-256 指纹，由你确认后再发送凭据。: The server SHA-256 fingerprint is shown for confirmation before credentials are sent.
连接成功后，凭据使用 Windows 当前用户加密并仅保存在本机。: After a successful connection, credentials are encrypted for the current Windows user and stored only on this PC.
连接成功后，凭据使用当前桌面用户的安全密钥环加密并仅保存在本机。: After a successful connection, credentials are encrypted with the current desktop user's secure keyring and stored only on this computer.
导入的 CA 仅用于当前主机和 HTTPS 端口，不修改系统证书库。: Imported CAs apply only to the current host and HTTPS port; the system certificate store is not modified.
不安装全局键盘或鼠标钩子；凭据使用当前桌面用户的安全密钥环加密；会话密钥不写日志: No global keyboard or mouse hooks are installed; credentials are encrypted with the current desktop user's secure keyring; session keys are never logged; certificate trust is explicit, scoped by host, and revocable; network, decoding, and file queues are bounded and cancellable.
取消固定，鼠标离开后自动隐藏: Unpin and hide after the pointer leaves
当前刀片为只读监视会话: The current blade is a read-only monitor session
分屏视图为只读；关闭分屏后可向选中刀片输入: Split view is read-only; close it to send input to the selected blade
当前账户没有 KVM 控制权限: This account does not have KVM control permission
已连接，鼠标移入远程画面后可输入: Connected; move the pointer over the remote image to enable input
选择最多六个 HID 按键。发送后会自动释放全部按键。: Select up to six HID keys. All keys are released automatically after sending.
核对指纹后再发送登录凭据: Verify the fingerprint before sending login credentials
导入的 CA 仅用于当前主机和 HTTPS 端口，不修改 Windows 证书库: Imported CAs apply only to the current host and HTTPS port. The Windows certificate store is unchanged.
连接 · 输入 · 录像 · 电源 · 虚拟媒体: Connection · Input · Recording · Power · Virtual media
输入 iBMC 主机名、IP 或 HTTPS 地址。共享控制允许其他管理者同时查: Enter an iBMC host name, IP address, or HTTPS URL. Shared mode allows other administrators to view; exclusive mode requests an exclusive channel. Strict certificate validation is the default. Verify the subject, issuer, validity, and SHA-256 fingerprint before trusting a self-signed certificate. Persistent server trust and imported CAs are scoped to the displayed host and port and can be revoked from the login window.
瞬时网络故障会在固定次数和时限内自动重连。KVM 恢复成功后才会恢复原先已挂载的: Transient network failures reconnect within fixed attempt and time limits. Mounted virtual media is restored only after KVM recovery succeeds. A final failure remains visible and never retries indefinitely.
绝对模式把指针位置映射到远端画面；相对模式发送移动量；捕获模式用于单鼠标操作，单: Absolute mode maps the pointer to the remote image. Relative mode sends movement deltas. Captured mode provides single-pointer operation: click the image to capture and press Esc to release. The toolbar controls local-pointer visibility and synchronization. Split and monitor sessions are always read-only.
键盘只在远程画面获得焦点时发送。组合键菜单提供 Ctrl+Alt+Delete: Keyboard input is sent only while the remote viewer has focus. The menu includes presets such as Ctrl+Alt+Delete, a custom six-key combination, keyboard reset, and US, Japanese, and French layouts. Release reports are sent when focus is lost or the selected blade changes.
录像按钮可保存 .rep 格式录像，或导出标准 Motion JPEG AVI。: The recording button saves a .rep recording or exports standard Motion JPEG AVI. AVI recording starts only after the first frame. Disk writes and JPEG encoding use bounded background queues, so they cannot block video reception. Disk errors and dropped frames appear in the status bar. Recording stops safely before switching blades.
开机、正常关机、重启、强制断电重启和强制关机都作用于当前选中的控制刀片。每项操作: Power on, graceful shutdown, restart, forced power cycle, and forced power off apply to the selected control blade. Every operation requires confirmation; forced operations can lose data. Account permissions and server denials disable unavailable controls and show a specific reason. Monitor sessions cannot send power commands.
软驱支持镜像和物理驱动器，默认写保护；光驱支持 ISO、物理光驱和本地目录。目录: The floppy slot supports images and physical drives and is write-protected by default. The optical slot supports ISO files, physical drives, and local directories; directories become temporary Joliet ISOs. Both slots can be mounted together. Closing the window does not eject media. Disconnecting closes VMM and removes temporary images. USB reset requires separate confirmation.
机箱面板显示最多 14 个槽位的未安装、重置中、不支持 KVM、占用、SOL、固: The chassis panel shows absent, resetting, KVM-unsupported, busy, SOL, firmware-loading, and available states for up to 14 slots. At most four sessions can be open. Tabs select the command target. Monitor mode and the 2x2 split view display video without keyboard or mouse input. Closing one blade does not affect other sessions.
所有网络等待、解码和录像任务都在界面线程之外执行。: All network waits, decoding, and recording run outside the UI thread.
支持现代 iBMC、旧版 iBMC RMCP+/OEM 与 iMana 会话配置: Supports modern iBMC, legacy iBMC RMCP+/OEM, and iMana session profiles, including plain or encrypted KVM, virtual media, 14-slot chassis, relative and absolute input, DQT clarity, and 8/7/6/4-bit color. Actual firmware support is determined at runtime.
不安装全局键盘或鼠标钩子；凭据使用 Windows 当前用户 DPAPI 加密；: No global keyboard or mouse hooks are installed. Credentials use current-user Windows DPAPI encryption. Session keys are never logged. Certificate trust is explicit, host-scoped, and revocable. Network, decode, and file queues are bounded and cancellable.
连接失败，请检查连接设置。: Connection failed. Check the connection settings.
请输入用户名和密码。: Enter a user name and password.
连接已取消或超时，请检查网络后重试。: The connection was cancelled or timed out. Check the network and try again.
正在验证账号与远程控制权限: Validating the account and remote-control permission
登录响应缺少 KVM 校验值。: The login response does not contain a KVM verification value.
登录响应缺少 KVM 端口。: The login response does not contain a KVM port.
登录响应缺少权限级别。: The login response does not contain a privilege level.
正在协商 KVM 视频与输入通道: Negotiating the KVM video and input channel
HTTPS 不可用，正在尝试 RMCP+ 旧固件登录: HTTPS is unavailable; trying legacy RMCP+ login
正在协商旧固件 KVM 视频与输入通道: Negotiating the legacy KVM video and input channel
用户未信任服务器证书。: The server certificate was not trusted.
无法删除本地连接设置，请检查文件权限。: The local connection settings could not be deleted. Check file permissions.
用户名或密码不正确。请核对大小写和密码末尾字符。: The user name or password is incorrect. Check capitalization and trailing password characters.
该用户没有远程控制权限。: This user does not have remote-control permission.
iBMC 当前限制该登录方式。: iBMC currently restricts this login method.
iBMC 登录失败，错误码 {0}。: iBMC login failed with error code {0}.
证书文件大小无效。: The certificate file size is invalid.
已连接 {0}，本地设置未能更新: Connected to {0}; local settings could not be updated
Rx {0} · 视频 {1} · CRC {2} · 帧错误 {3} · 命令: Rx {0} · video {1} · CRC {2} · frame errors {3} · command 0x{4:X2}
刀片 {0} 只读监视已连接: Blade {0} connected in read-only monitor mode
确认向服务器发送开机命令？: Send the power-on command to the server?
确认立即重启服务器？未保存的数据可能丢失。: Restart the server now? Unsaved data may be lost.
确认强制断电后重新上电？该操作不同于普通重启，可能造成文件系统损坏和数据丢失。: Force power off and then power on? This is not a normal restart and may damage the file system or lose data.
确认立即强制关机？未保存的数据将丢失。: Force the server off now? Unsaved data will be lost.
KVM 自动恢复失败：已尝试 {0} 次，请检查网络和服务器状态。: Automatic KVM recovery failed after {0} attempts. Check the network and server status.
KVM 已恢复，但虚拟介质恢复失败：{0}: KVM recovered, but virtual-media recovery failed: {0}
收到第一帧视频后才能开始 AVI 录像: AVI recording can start only after the first video frame arrives
已切换到捕获鼠标；单击画面捕获，按 Esc 释放: Captured pointer mode selected; click the image to capture and press Esc to release
鼠标已捕获；按 Esc 释放: Pointer captured; press Esc to release
当前账户没有执行电源操作的权限。: The current account cannot perform power operations.
当前账户没有使用虚拟软驱或虚拟光驱的权限。: The current account cannot use virtual floppy or optical drives.
当前账户没有电源控制权限: The current account does not have power-control permission
当前账户没有虚拟介质权限: The current account does not have virtual-media permission
确认重置远端 USB 虚拟媒体设备？当前挂载的虚拟介质可能会短暂断开。: Reset the remote USB virtual-media devices? Mounted media may disconnect briefly.
未检测到可用的物理软驱。: No usable physical floppy drive was detected.
未检测到可用的物理光驱。: No usable physical optical drive was detected.
{0} 中没有就绪的介质。: No ready media is present in {0}.
